title: Dashboard
description: The Dashboard is your personalized home screen in Parthenon, providing an at-a-glance summary of recent activity, data source status, pending tasks, and quick-access shortcuts to your most frequently used analytical assets. It is designed to orient both new and returning users to the current state of their research environment.
tips: Pin your most frequently used cohort definitions and concept sets to the Dashboard for one-click access during active research projects.
The data source status panel surfaces any ingestion failures or connectivity issues — review it at the start of each session before running analyses.
Recent activity cards track your last-edited analyses, cohort generations, and study packages, making it easy to resume work across sessions.
Use the Dashboard notifications area to stay informed about cohort generation completions, scheduled job results, and platform announcements.
Administrators can customize the default Dashboard layout to surface organization-specific metrics and approved data sources for all users.
